cnf.interaction_detail: Confidence classification is surface-type-dependent. The same photon receives different confidence scores depending on which surface type (srt) is applied. Changing srt changes which photons survive the cnf filter.

required_pairings.with_atl08_class: Set cnf=0 (no native filtering) to let all ATL08-classified photons through
required_pairings.with_atl24: Set cnf=-1 (all photons) to let all ATL24-classified photons through

srt.interaction_detail: Forcing srt overrides the per-photon surface mask globally. Use when the automatic mask misclassifies the surface (e.g., small lakes classified as land, ice shelf margins).

required_pairings.with_atl08_class: Set srt=0 (land) to allow all ATL08 photon classifications
required_pairings.with_atl24: Set srt=-1 (dynamic) to allow all ATL24 photon classifications

atl08_class.implicit_behavior: When atl08_class is set and an ATL08 ancillary field is requested, ATL08 classifications are automatically enabled with unclassified photons filtered out. If PhoREAL is also enabled, noise photons are auto-filtered. Manual specification of atl08_class takes precedence.

res.interaction_detail: res < len = overlapping extents (correlated). res = len = adjacent (independent samples). res > len = gaps. Default 20/40 gives 2:1 overlap.

len.interaction_detail: Longer extents average more photons (smoother, less noise) but lose fine-scale surface features. Must have at least cnt photons within len to produce a valid extent.

fit.implicit_behavior: An empty object {} is sufficient to enable surface fitting. No fields are required.

phoreal.implicit_behavior: Enabling PhoREAL uses ATL08 land surface classifications. Noise photons are automatically filtered out when PhoREAL is active.

required_pairings.cnf: Set to -1 (all photons) — bathymetric returns are inherently low-confidence

atl08_fields.implicit_behavior: Adding an atl08_field automatically enables ATL08 classification with unclassified photons filtered out. If PhoREAL is also active, noise photons are auto-filtered. Manual atl08_class specification takes precedence.
atl08_fields.note: For PhoREAL extents, per-photon ATL08 values are reduced to per-extent by nearest neighbor (mode). Append '%' to a field name for interpolated (average) reduction instead.
